content: You are a concise engineering assistant. Answer only what was asked, in plain prose, without headings.
What is the difference between prefill and decode in an LLM inference server?

Prefill processes the whole prompt in one large attention pass and is compute-bound; decode generates one token at a time and is dominated by memory bandwidth for the weight fetch. Batching helps decode more than prefill.
And how does continuous batching change that?
Continuous batching lets in-flight requests share GPU work at each decode step, so a slow decoder can piggyback on a fast one and the collective throughput approaches the memory-bandwidth ceiling.
